input:
Title: Fix memory leak in connector pool
Author: Carlos Reyes
Assignee: Yuki Tanaka
Labels: bug, performance
Milestone: v0.5.0

Body:
We're seeing RSS grow by ~50MB/hour in production when the Slack connector is active. Heap profiling points to the connection pool not releasing closed sockets.

Reproduction: Start the connector, send 1000 messages, observe RSS growth.

Expected: Memory stays stable after GC.
Actual: Memory grows unbounded.

Related to #247 (rate limiter refactor by Ana Lima).
